

CACHET’s logo has a 3-part visual element:

First the title: ‘CACHET’  
Second the subtitle: Peintres Décorateurs (no accents)  
And a vignette : The Bauhaus style C and D shapes that can be used as a template for watermarking, tapestry and general visual identity.

**HEX color codes:**  
Dark Green:  314732  
Light Green:  7a8876  
Light Grey:  b7b6b6  
Dark Gray:  444445

These can be put together or separate. Stacked or Side by Side.

Examples:

![][image1]  
![][image2]

![][image3]![][image4]
